summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright integration checks for NOVA startup, Polymarket proxy connectivity, wallet modal, and market detail rendering. All requested critical flows passed.
action_items: No blocking issues from this test run.
Optional hardening: replace blocking requests.request in async FastAPI proxy path with an async HTTP client (httpx.AsyncClient) to prevent event-loop blocking under concurrent load.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses synchronous requests.request inside async route handlers; under scale this can reduce throughput and increase latency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints validated against public preview URL using env-driven base URL. CLOB /time endpoint currently returns a numeric JSON value (not always an object with `time` key), so tests should keep flexible parsing.
rca of the issue: N/A - no failing product flow in this run. One test expectation issue was corrected after observing /api/clob/time returns a JSON number in this environment.
